article_meta.title: Metro An open letter from the heart of Iran to America – Don’t give up on us By California Post Staff Published March 7, 2026, 7:11 p.m

reasoning: The assistant systematically flagged partisan, first-person open-letter content that clearly belongs to the source (Omid) rather than the article author, violating attribution rules. It also used non-standard bias labels and overreached with multiple false positives. There is little to no author connecting prose showing bias; the correct output should likely have been [].

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged passages are from the open letter’s source voice, not the journalist’s prose, breaching the attribution rule.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Multiple items were flagged as author bias despite being sourced first-person narrative; these are not author-level bias instances.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: No significant bias in the author’s connecting prose appears to have been missed; there was little to none present.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Labels such as 'Pro-Trump Bias' and 'Anti-Left Media Bias' are not among the valid types; others are misapplied and nonstandard.
